cases.title: Manim Equation Visualizer
cases.prompt: Create a visualizer of a Python Manim animation using uv and uv inline dependencies of this equation `(x^2 + y^2 - 1)^3 = x^2 y^3` and your model name inside it. Use `uv init` before starting. Make sure everything is well spaced and centered, nothing overlaps, and everything is fully visible.

cases.title: SF Founder Tinder
cases.prompt: Create a Tinder-like application for SF founders.

cases.title: Roasting Habit Tracker
cases.prompt: Build a habit tracker that roasts you if you fail to keep up your habits. It generates a sad image of your profile picture and a joke roasting you using AI.

cases.title: Gen 1 Pokemon Guessing Game
cases.prompt: Recreate a Gen 1 Pokemon Guessing Game based on this reference image: `/Users/francescooddo/Library/CloudStorage/GoogleDrive-oddofrancesco000@gmail.com/My Drive/Francesco Oddo/ASSETS/Pokemon-Guessing-Game.png`. Match the overall look and layout closely, including the retro dark UI, pixel-style feel, controls row, score block, and the numbered Pokemon grid.

cases.title: 3D Pumpkin with GSAP and Three.js
cases.prompt: Create a 3D pumpkin with GSAP and Three.js.

cases.title: Mirai Developer Linktree
cases.prompt: Create a Linktree clone, but for developers, in a neo-brutalist minimal GitHub-inspired design. The name is Mirai. Add a GitHub commits dashboard in the same style. Add a GSAP animation of a GitHub logo filling in as the initial loading animation. Add a subtle ASCII animation in the background that fits the style.

cases.title: Expo Astrology App
cases.prompt: Create a mobile app with Expo. The app is an astrology app that generates images using Nano Banana Pro with FAL using your astral sign.

cases.title: Steampunk Pomodoro Timer
cases.prompt: Create a mobile app Pomodoro timer in steampunk style. The more you stay focused, the bigger your compute power gets.
